meta.title: Skill Packs | Console
meta.description: Instructions and reference files for your assistants, applied automatically in chat.

productScope.description: Skill Packs are instructions and reference files that teach your assistant how to work. Create or edit them here, or import a zip folder. Compatible with skill directories from tools like Cursor and Claude Code. When mounted on an assistant, the assistant follows SKILL.md in chat and can read other files in the pack on demand. **Scripts in the pack are not run in this version.**

scriptsReadOnly.message: Scripts in this pack are read-only
scriptsReadOnly.description: The assistant can read files under `scripts/` as reference, but **they are not run** in this version.

empty.importHint: Or import a zip skill pack (compatible with Cursor, Claude Code, and similar tools)

rules.max: Name must be at most {max} characters.
Description must be at most {max} characters.

skillMd.extra: Optional YAML header. The body below is provided to the assistant in chat (the header is ignored). Max body {max} characters.

import.title: Import Skill Pack
import.dragHint: Drop a .zip file here or click to upload
import.conflict: A Skill Pack with this name already exists

scripts.title: What are scripts in a pack?
scripts.body: Some Skill Packs include script files (e.g. Python). The assistant can read them as reference, but **they are not executed** in this version. Script execution is planned for a future release.

delete.title: Delete this Skill Pack?
delete.description: Files in the pack will be removed. Unmount from assistants first if referenced.

deleteBlocked.title: Cannot delete
deleteBlocked.body: Open <assistantsLink>Assistant management</assistantsLink> to remove mounts first.
